title: Microsoft Responsible AI Standard v2 Reference Guide
summary: Reference guide describing Microsoft's Responsible AI Standard and implementation expectations.
auditUse: Use as a practical control-pattern reference for responsible AI governance.

title: Secure AI Framework
summary: Google's AI security framework for secure-by-default AI development and deployment.
auditUse: Use as a white-paper style security reference for AI application control reviews.

title: Artificial Intelligence: An Accountability Framework for Federal Agencies and Other Entities
summary: Detailed GAO framework for accountability practices around AI governance, data, performance, and monitoring.
auditUse: Use to convert AI accountability principles into concrete audit procedures.

title: Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework: Generative Artificial Intelligence Profile
summary: Technical profile adapting the NIST AI RMF to generative AI risks.
auditUse: Use to identify GenAI-specific risk events and suggested actions.

title: FactSheets for AI Services
summary: Introduces supplier declarations of conformity as factsheets for AI services.
auditUse: Use as a documentation pattern for vendor AI systems and third-party assurance.

title: Assessment List for Trustworthy Artificial Intelligence
organization: European Commission High-Level Expert Group on AI
summary: Self-assessment list translating trustworthy AI requirements into practical questions.
auditUse: Use as a question bank for qualitative AI governance and ethics reviews.

title: International AI Safety Report 2025
summary: International expert synthesis of evidence on advanced AI capabilities, risks, and safety practices.
auditUse: Use to ground frontier AI audit programs in current risk evidence, including misuse, bias, hallucination, jailbreaks, and safeguard limitations.

title: International AI Safety Report 2026
summary: Second international report reviewing scientific research on the capabilities and risks of general-purpose AI systems.
auditUse: Use as a current evidence base for advanced-AI assurance, risk taxonomies, safety evaluations, and monitoring priorities.
